school.title: Every journey begins with purpose, direction, and care
school.intro: A school environment designed for clarity, curiosity, and confidence.

items.title: Purposeful learning spaces
items.text: Every area is planned to help students stay focused, comfortable, and ready to learn.

items.title: Student-first environment
items.text: Supportive systems help children feel seen, guided, and encouraged throughout the day.

classroom.title: Technology that supports learning - not distracts from it
classroom.intro: Every classroom is designed for clarity, curiosity, and understanding.

items.title: Smart teaching tools
items.text: Interactive displays and modern systems help teachers explain concepts clearly and visually.

items.title: Gamified learning platforms
items.text: Game-inspired learning makes lessons more engaging while improving retention.

educraft.title: Hands-on discovery for future-ready learners
educraft.intro: Students learn by building, testing, exploring, and improving ideas.

items.title: STEM exploration
items.text: Students use practical tools to understand science, technology, and design thinking.

items.title: Project-based learning
items.text: Real activities help students connect classroom knowledge with real-world application.

karate.title: Discipline, movement, and confidence in action
karate.intro: Karate helps students build focus, balance, respect, and physical confidence.

items.title: Confidence through practice
items.text: Students learn consistency, control, and self-belief through guided training.

items.title: Healthy movement
items.text: Regular movement helps improve fitness, attention, and emotional balance.

sports.title: Energy beyond the classroom
sports.intro: Sports build teamwork, resilience, confidence, and a healthy daily rhythm.

items.title: Team spirit
items.text: Students learn communication, leadership, and discipline through team play.

items.title: Active routines
items.text: Regular sports activities support physical health and classroom readiness.
